title: Cardano DB Sync Helm Values
description: Supernode-opinionated Cardano DB Sync chart values. Secrets are sourced only through VaultStaticSecret; the chart-managed Kubernetes Secret is an internal delivery mechanism created by the Vault Secrets Operator.

nameOverride.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Overrides the Kubernetes app name used by the chart.

fullnameOverride.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Overrides the full Kubernetes resource name. Leave empty so the release name controls resource names.

displayName.description: Optional. Human-readable workload name shown by Supernode tooling. MCP normally sets this from releaseName.

credentials.description: Required. Vault location for PostgreSQL credentials consumed by both Postgres and Cardano DB Sync. The Vault record should include username, password, and database keys.

keys.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Key names expected in the Vault record.

postgres.description: Required. PostgreSQL backing Cardano DB Sync. Normal installs only set postgres.persistence.storageClass and optionally size/resources.

image.description: Advanced, usually not modified. PostgreSQL image repository and tag.

port.description: Advanced, usually not modified. PostgreSQL Service and container port.

resources.description: Optional. Kubernetes CPU and memory requests and limits for PostgreSQL. Recommended starting points: preview/preprod request 500m CPU and 4Gi memory with a 2 CPU limit; mainnet request 500m CPU and 16Gi memory with a 4 CPU limit.

nodeSelector.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Node selector for PostgreSQL scheduling.

tolerations.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Tolerations for PostgreSQL scheduling.

affinity.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Affinity rules for PostgreSQL scheduling.

persistence.description: Required. Persistent storage for PostgreSQL data. Recommended starting points: 50Gi for preview/preprod and 600Gi for mainnet.

dbSync.description: Required. Cardano DB Sync runtime settings. Set dbSync.network to match the upstream Cardano relay and Midnight environment.

image.description: Optional. Cardano DB Sync image repository and tag.

replicas.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Keep 1 because DB Sync is a single-writer workload.

network.description: Required. Cardano network DB Sync follows.

resources.description: Optional. Kubernetes CPU and memory requests and limits for Cardano DB Sync. Recommended starting points: preview/preprod request 500m CPU and 4Gi memory with a 2 CPU limit; mainnet request 500m CPU and 24Gi memory with a 4 CPU limit.

nodeSelector.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Node selector for DB Sync scheduling.

tolerations.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Tolerations for DB Sync scheduling.

affinity.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Affinity rules for DB Sync scheduling.

persistence.description: Required. Persistent storage for DB Sync state. Recommended starting points: 10Gi for preview/preprod and 20Gi for mainnet.

enabled.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Keep enabled for real deployments.

storageClass.description: Required. Kubernetes StorageClass used for DB Sync state.

size.description: Optional. Requested DB Sync state PVC size.

existingClaim.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Existing PVC for DB Sync state.

cardanoNode.description: Required. Upstream Cardano relay used by the built-in socket proxy. MCP should use workloads.list to find same-network Cardano relay candidates and ask the operator to approve the exact host:port.

upstreamAddress.description: Required. Cardano relay endpoint in host:port form, for example cardano-relay.default.svc.cluster.local:3000.

socketPath.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Unix socket path exposed inside the DB Sync pod.

socketProxyTls.description: Optional. Enables TLS for the built-in socat socket proxy when the upstream Cardano node endpoint is behind TLS termination. Plain TCP is used by default.

enabled.description: Optional. Use socat OPENSSL mode instead of TCP for the upstream Cardano node connection.

socketProxyImage.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Socat image used for the Cardano socket proxy.

nodeSelector.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Reserved for compatibility; use postgres.nodeSelector or dbSync.nodeSelector.

tolerations.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Reserved for compatibility; use postgres.tolerations or dbSync.tolerations.

affinity.description: Advanced, usually not modified. Reserved for compatibility; use postgres.affinity or dbSync.affinity.

path.description: Required. Runtime Vault path without kv/data prefix.

storageClass.description: Required. Kubernetes StorageClass for persistent data.
